## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Metadata and fwd.digital to discuss content strategy, performance, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Performance doubled in clicks and CTR; top-performing content includes ABM examples, Facebook ads, and ABX marketing](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [28 new content ideas ready for review, focusing on mid/bottom-funnel topics aligned with product pages](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [AI-related content to be incorporated in future topics (every 5-10 pieces) to support Metadata's AI-first positioning](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Workflow improvements discussed for image handoff and content creation process using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Indexing

  - [Clicks and CTR doubled compared to last week](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Top performers: Account-based marketing examples, Facebook ads, ABX marketing](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Some new content not yet indexed in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Anthony to adjust Aida's permissions for requesting indexing](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Sitemap issues identified (404 error), Anthony to resubmit correct sitemap](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

### Content Planning and Creation

  - [28 new content ideas moved to "Considering" status in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Topics focus on mid/bottom-funnel, aligned with product pages and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Anthony to review and approve topics, moving them to "Ready to Start"](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Future rounds to include AI-related topics (every 5-10 pieces)](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [New AI features: AI analyst agent for data analysis and recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### AI Content Creation Workflow

  - [fwd.digital using custom workflow with AirOps, ChatGPT, and human editing](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Three-step process: research, outline generation, and article creation](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Human intervention at each stage to ensure quality and specificity](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Challenges with AI-generated content: repetition, vagueness, and lack of depth](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)

### Image Handoff Process

  - [Anthony to add image links to Airtable and tag Sedera in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [Custom images used for Metadata, unlike stock or AI-generated images for other clients](https://fathom.video/share/oETPuo4r2Eckm-zCEXzhiKGzmHFjAWsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
